title: Repository code inspection tab
summary: Adds a repository-level Code tab for inspecting Snapshot code, reuses the Snapshot code browser, and keeps the Snapshot history rail in code context when selecting another Snapshot from the Code page.

risks.title: The repository Code tab embeds the same file browser as the Snapshot route, so very wide code still relies on horizontal scrolling inside the viewer.

decisions.title: Extract the Snapshot code browser into a reusable component so the Snapshot Code route and repository Code tab share file list, mode switching, Shiki highlighting, and unavailable-file states.
Make the Snapshot rail context-aware: selecting another Snapshot from the Code page stays on the Code route, while an explicit Open Snapshot action handles navigation to the Snapshot detail page.
